_comment: s&box Dedicated Server egg. SteamCMD app id 1892930. Sourced from sbox.game/dev/doc/networking/dedicated-servers (April 2026).
name: s&box Dedicated Server
author: ops@local
description: Facepunch s&box dedicated server. Source 2 + .NET 8. Installs via SteamCMD (anonymous) app 1892930. See https://sbox.game/dev/doc/networking/dedicated-servers/

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# s&box installer — runs inside the install container (ghcr.io/parkervcp/installers:debian)
set -e

apt-get update
apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends curl tar lib32gcc-s1 ca-certificates wget unzip file

mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd
cd /mnt/server/steamcmd

curl -sSL https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz | tar -xz

BETA_FLAG=""
if [ "${SRCDS_BETA}" = "1" ] || [ "${SRCDS_BETA}" = "true" ] || [ "${SRCDS_BETA}" = "staging" ]; then
    BETA_FLAG="-beta staging"
fi

./steamcmd.sh +force_install_dir /mnt/server +login anonymous +app_update ${SRCDS_APPID} ${BETA_FLAG} validate +quit

# Surface the executable at the working directory root (Pterodactyl runs from /home/container == /mnt/server)
if [ ! -f /mnt/server/sbox-server.exe ]; then
    echo "WARN: sbox-server.exe not found at install root. Listing /mnt/server:"
    ls -la /mnt/server
fi

chmod +x /mnt/server/sbox-server.exe 2>/dev/null || true

echo "Install complete."

variables.name: Steam App ID
variables.description: SteamCMD app id for the s&box dedicated server. Default 1892930 (per official docs).

variables.name: Use Staging Branch
variables.description: Set to 1 to install the -beta staging branch. Leave 0 for stable.

variables.name: Server Name
variables.description: Hostname shown in the server browser.

variables.name: Game Package
variables.description: Game package ident to load (e.g. facepunch.sandbox).

variables.name: Map Package
variables.description: Optional map package ident (e.g. facepunch.flatgrass). Leave blank to let the game pick.

variables.name: Query Port
variables.description: UDP port used for server browser queries (+net_query_port).

variables.name: Extra Startup Args
variables.description: Appended verbatim to the startup line. Example: +net_game_server_token YOURTOKEN +maxplayers 16
